summary: Completed comprehensive Web Analytics dashboard testing. Frontend UI fully functional but displays empty states due to backend API endpoints returning 404 errors. Mock data fallback successfully removed as requested.

critical_bugs.impact: KPI cards show zero values instead of analytics data
Real-time visitor panel shows zero active visitors
Click heatmap displays 'No heatmap data available'

critical_bugs.issue: WebSocket connection fails with 404 during handshake
critical_bugs.impact: Falls back to polling mode, shows 'Polling' status instead of 'Live'

integration_issues.issue: All components show empty/zero states due to API failures

passed_tests: Admin Console loads correctly with proper sidebar navigation
Web Analytics navigation item appears in ANALYTICS section
Web Analytics dashboard renders without UI errors
All 4 KPI cards display correctly with proper structure (Total Visitors, Conversions, Bounce Rate, Avg Session Duration)
Real-time visitors panel displays with chart area and '0 active now' indicator
Active Sessions panel displays with traffic source breakdown section
Click Heatmap section displays with page selector dropdown and days selector
Date range selector (7/14/30/90 days) is functional and triggers API calls
Page selector in heatmap section is present and accessible
Connection status correctly shows 'Polling' when WebSocket fails
Refresh button is present and clickable
All interactive controls have proper test-id attributes for testing
Component gracefully handles API failures with appropriate empty states
Mock data fallback successfully removed (showing empty states instead of mock data)
Error handling in component works correctly - no JavaScript errors in console
Authentication flow works properly with admin role validation

success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All UI components functional, shows proper empty states
success_percentage.backend: 11.1% (1/9 tests passed - only login authentication works)
success_percentage.integration: 0% - All Web Analytics API endpoints unavailable

action_item_for_main_agent: Critical: Implement missing backend Web Analytics API endpoints on staging server: 1) /api/dashboard/overview?days=X (for KPI data) 2) /api/dashboard/realtime (for live visitor data) 3) /api/dashboard/heatmap-data?page_url=X&days=X (for heatmap data) 4) WebSocket endpoint wss://*/api/ws/analytics?token=X (for live updates). All endpoints return 404 Not Found. Frontend is ready and properly integrated.
